title: INERRA Ribbon - 100 Yards - 50mm (2") Florist Wedding Car and Craft Uses (Black)
features: Waterproof ribbon for a whole range of florist, wedding and craft uses. Use for gift wrapping and seasonal decorations.
Each roll measures 100 Yards x 2 inch wide (91 Metres x 50mm)
Hardwearing and easy to cut polypropylene material
description: Product Description 100 Yards Per Roll 50mm Width (2") Florist Ribbon for a variety of uses. Great for use on wedding cars and all wedding decorations. Use for seasonal decorations such as decorating Christmas trees, wreaths and garlands. Also use for gift wrapping. Also known as poly tear ribbon Ribbon can be easily cut. Can be torn lengthways easily to create thinner strands of ribbon. Large Colour Range For all seasonal decorations Use for weddings and car decoration Suitable for all florist and craft ideas Vibrant Colours
